message:
test(poll): cover pselect tracked-short-sigmask EFAULT path

Adds the pselect-specific case missing from the prior poll_abi
guard test commit. pselect's sigmask argument is the same 8-byte
sigset_t that pself's tracked_region_fits guard already checks,
but the rejection path was previously only exercised through
ppoll. pselect_rejects_tracked_short_sigmask round-trips a
tracked allocation one byte short of size_of::<c_ulong>() and
asserts:

* malloc_known_remaining_for_tests reports the allocation as
  shorter than required (regression sentinel for the malloc
  tracker).
* pselect with all fd_sets null + ts pointing at zero-timeout +
  the short sigmask returns -1 and sets EFAULT before issuing
  pselect6.

Companion to ppoll_rejects_tracked_short_pollfd_array; together
they pin the sigmask portion of the
pollfd/sigmask/optional-timeout EFAULT contract on both surfaces.
